acceleration_coefficients.note: Coefficient A determined from seismic map Figure 9-1. Linear interpolation between contour lines.

values.description: Zone 1 -- Western rift valley (Kasese, Fort Portal, Bundibugyo, Kabale)
Zone 2 -- Central/northern Uganda (Kampala, Hoima, Arua, Gulu, Masindi)
Zone 3 -- Eastern Uganda (Soroti, Mbale, Tororo, most of central plateau)

importance_classification.note: IC assigned for all bridges with A > 0.29. For A <= 0.29 (all Uganda zones), IC assignment is for SPC determination.

classes.description: Essential bridges -- critical for Social/Survival and Security/Defense

performance_categories.note: SPC determines minimum analysis and design requirements

design_implications.spc_1: No special seismic design requirements. Minimum support lengths required.
design_implications.spc_1_and_2: No detailed seismic analysis required. Connections designed for 0.20 * dead load reaction force. Minimum support lengths per Eq 4-3A/B.
design_implications.spc_3: Full seismic analysis required per Section 9 procedures. Response modification factors from Table 9.4 apply.

site_coefficients.note: Approximates effect of site conditions on bridge response

coefficients.description: Rock or stiff soil < 200ft (61m) depth over rock
Stiff clay or deep cohesionless soil > 200ft (61m) over rock
Soft to medium-stiff clays and sands, 30ft (9m) or more of soft soil

site_coefficients.default_note: If soil properties not known, use Soil Profile Type II (S = 1.2)

response_modification_factors.note: For SPC 3 only. Elastic forces divided by R to obtain design forces.

substructure.note: May be designed as column in weak direction if Chapter 8 provisions followed (R = 3 for single column)

substructure.type: Reinforced Concrete Pile Bents - Vertical piles only
Reinforced Concrete Pile Bents - One or more Batter piles
Steel or composite pile bents - Vertical piles only
Steel or composite pile bents - One or more batter piles

connections.type: Expansion Joints within a span of the superstructure
Columns, Piers or pile bents to Cap Beam of Superstructure

analysis_procedures.note: Minimum analysis method by SPC and bridge regularity. Procedure 1 = Single-Mode Spectral. Procedure 2 = Multimode Spectral.
analysis_procedures.exception: Detailed seismic analysis not required for single span bridges or SPC 1 & 2 bridges.

seismic_zones_uganda.description: Uganda seismic zones from Figure 9-1 (Seismic Map of Uganda)

zones.regions: Western rift valley -- Kasese, Fort Portal, Bundibugyo, Bushenyi (west), Kabale, Mbarara (west)
zones.note: Highest seismicity in Uganda. East African Rift. SPC 3 for all bridges.

zones.regions: Central-western and northern Uganda -- Hoima, Masindi, Arua, Pachwach, Gulu, Mubende, parts of Kampala
zones.note: Moderate seismicity. SPC 2 for most bridges.

zones.regions: Eastern and central Uganda -- Soroti, Mbale, Tororo, Moroto, Kotido, Lira, Apac, most of central plateau
zones.note: Lowest seismicity in Uganda. SPC 1 for IC=II bridges.
